UAE Financial Calculators

Free online financial calculators for UAE residents and expats. Calculate your gratuity, VAT, and more — all instant, no signup required.

Dubai Rental Yield Calculator

Calculate net ROI with DLD fees, service charges, vacancy. Compare against Dubai benchmarks.

Gratuity Calculator

Calculate your end-of-service benefits under UAE Labour Law.

VAT Calculator

Add or extract 5% UAE VAT from any amount.
